task_description: Create all missing mobile API routes under /api/mobile/v1/ that the mobile-staff app calls but currently return 404, causing post-login crashes. Covers P0 (delivery flow, admin order management), P1 (product/category/staff/marketing CRUD), and P2 (advanced reports, audit log, subcategories, reviews, delivery pricing).

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) passes with zero errors. Next.js build (next build) completes successfully with all 78 mobile API routes compiled. No runtime database available for integration tests.
